title: Most Active Mission Factions
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM MissionAccepted WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT Faction AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM MissionAccepted WHERE Faction IS NOT NULL AND Faction != '' AND event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY Faction ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {count} mission(s) accepted from minor factions during the report period.
details.help: Faction is the issuing minor faction. inaraSearchBase enables click-through to Inara faction pages.

tagLines: Minor faction engagement data updated in the Pilots Federation BGS activity register.
Some factions got a lot more of your time than others. Here's the invoice.
These are the factions whose futures you shaped, one accepted contract at a time.
